problem: What material surface coating prevents bacterial biofilm formation on implants?
mechanism: Atomic layer deposition of conformal coating
hypothesis: Combining Atomic layer deposition of conformal coating with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Synthesis and characterization with 18 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
